tool.name: Geocode Named Entities

param.name: input
param.label: NLP-annotated JSON
param.help: JSON output from spaCy or Stanza with NER annotations

param.name: entity_types
param.label: Entity types to geocode
param.option: ORG (organizations — may resolve if named after a place)

tool.help:
Geocode Named Entities ======================
Extracts location-type named entities from NLP-annotated JSON (spaCy or Stanza) and geocodes them to geographic coordinates using Nominatim (OpenStreetMap).
How It Works ------------
1. Reads NER-annotated JSON output from the spaCy or Stanza Galaxy tools 2. Extracts entities matching the selected types (GPE, LOC, FAC) 3. Deduplicates entity names and geocodes each unique name via Nominatim 4. Outputs GeoJSON (viewable with Galaxy's OpenLayers plugin) and a tabular summary
Entity Types ------------
**GPE** (Geo-Political Entity) Countries, cities, states, provinces. Most reliable for geocoding.
**LOC** (Location) Non-GPE locations: mountains, bodies of water, regions.
**FAC** (Facility) Buildings, airports, highways, bridges. May or may not resolve.
**ORG** (Organization) Organizations that may resolve if named after a place (e.g., "Pentagon"). Use with caution — many organizations won't geocode successfully.
Outputs -------
**GeoJSON** Standard GeoJSON FeatureCollection with Point geometries. Each feature includes:
- ``name``: Entity text - ``entity_type``: NER label (GPE, LOC, etc.) - ``count``: Number of mentions in the text - ``display_name``: Full address from Nominatim
Viewable directly in Galaxy using the **OpenLayers** visualization plugin.
**Tabular summary** Tab-separated file with columns: entity, type, latitude, longitude, count, display_name. Sorted by mention count (descending).
Nominatim Server ----------------
By default, this tool uses the public OpenStreetMap Nominatim API, which is rate-limited to 1 request per second. For large-scale geocoding, administrators can deploy a self-hosted Nominatim instance and configure the tool to use it.
Self-hosting options:
- Docker: `mediagis/nominatim <https://github.com/mediagis/nominatim-docker>`_ - Regional extracts from `Geofabrik <https://download.geofabrik.de/>`_ reduce storage needs - No rate limiting when self-hosted
Example Workflow ----------------
::
Upload text → spaCy (NER, JSON) → Geocode Entities → GeoJSON → OpenLayers map
